name: O.R.C. Orb Weaver Jr.
description: The O.R.C. Orb Weaver Jr. is the shock-unit version of the Orb Weaver Jr. in Grounded 2. It keeps the base species' speed and aggression, but now acts as an escort for nests and O.R.C. nodes.
behavior: It moves through webs, caves, and MIX.R sites on short patrols. Unlike the base version, it is almost always ready to intercept before you get too close.
interactionWithPlayer: It jumps on you as soon as it detects you and often appears with other spiders from the same nest. If you hesitate after the first block, the combo closes the gap again immediately.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually operates around webs and other O.R.C. spiders, reinforcing ambushes where larger enemies are already applying pressure.
strategy: Its main punish windows still come after the combo and the longer leap. Keep the pace, avoid fighting inside extra web lines, and kill it before more spiders join in.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: It uses a fast bite to open pressure and keep you close to its web zone.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: A short chained series of bites that punishes early counterattacks.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It pulls back for a moment before lunging forward with extra momentum.
